$comment: Design token file for the Breadcrumb Item component
$description: A single step in a breadcrumb trail. Renders a leading icon (home or dots), a text label, and a trailing chevron separator. Two types: Default (icon + label) and Overflow (dots icon representing collapsed items). Two states: default (gray, regular weight) and Selected (blue, semibold — marks the active/current page). Chevron color is always gray regardless of state.

gap.description: Horizontal gap between the leading icon, label text, and trailing chevron

default.description: 14px Regular, 20px line-height — ancestor steps that are navigable but not the current page

selected.description: 14px SemiBold, 20px line-height — the current/active page, visually distinct from ancestor steps

default.description: #1d2939 — muted label for navigable ancestor steps

selected.description: #004eeb — blue label highlighting the currently active breadcrumb step

size.description: Width and height of the leading icon — home-02 for Default type, dots-horizontal for Overflow type
Width and height of the chevron-right separator icon

color.description: #1d2939 — always gray regardless of the item's state; the chevron is a separator, not a state indicator
